full_text:
Qu Yi 麴義
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Qu Yi (麴義). Defeated Han Fu, Yufuluo and destroyed Gongsun Zan. Became arrogant and was executed. Qu Yi was affiliated with the Han Fu Dynasty and Yuan Shao.
